---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: publications.bib
nocite: "@*"
csl: publist.csl
reference-section-title: Publications
---

This publication list is based on my
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3655-406X) profile. You can also view my
publications on [Google
Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YrX1Z8MAAAAJ&hl=en).
